enriched_points.expanded_content: Recycling processes can range from $0 to $1.23/kg, with costs influenced by the type of plastic and efficiency of recovery methods (Source 1).
High-quality recyclables are increasingly sought after, yet low contract prices in municipalities can hinder profitability, impacting market dynamics (Source 5).
Investing in advanced sorting technologies can enhance recovery rates, but current recycling methods still struggle to compete with traditional landfilling costs (Source 2).
